item.title: Upcoming Webinar on Computer Vision and Edge AI for Defect Detection
item.description: Join Sundeep Ahluwalia, Chief Product Officer at TDK SensEI, as he explores the future of industrial manufacturing and computer vision. In this webinar, Sundeep introduces edgeRX Vision—a powerful combination of computer vision and edge AI designed to deliver fast, accurate quality control directly on the production line.

item.title: LIVE WEBINAR: Artificial Intelligence for Automatic Inspection
item.description: Discover how machine learning enhances defect detection, reduces pseudo-rejects, and supports compliance with industry standards, highlighting practical implementations.

item.title: Webinar: Preventing Critical Misses in Defect Detection - Voxel 51
item.description: Join technical experts from Voxel51 and MongoDB to explore a data-centric approach to defect detection, focusing on practical implementations and strategies to prevent critical misses.

item.title: Live Webinar - ASNT Education
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies ...

item.title: Informative Session on Building AI Defect Recognition for Industrial Radiography in Die Casting
item.description: The session is designed to provide insights into how AI-driven approaches can enhance defect detection accuracy in radiographic inspection, with a strong emphasis on a data-first methodology. It will highlight the importance of high-quality annotation, effective training practices, and robust performance measurement in real-world industrial environments for the diecasting industry.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.

item.title: Using Computer Vision and edge AI for Defect Detection
item.description: Join Sundeep Ahluwalia, Chief Product Officer at TDK SensEI, as he explores the future of industrial manufacturing and computer vision. In this webinar, Sundeep introduces edgeRX Vision—a powerful combination of computer vision and edge AI designed to deliver fast, accurate quality control directly on the production line.
